arts.ttl: Auxerre predicted XI v Lille: Han-Noah Massengo set for place on bench
arts.sum: Han-Noah Massengo completed a return to AJ Auxerre earlier this week. He could be involved as L’AJA host Lille OSC at the Stade de l’Abbé-Deschamps on Friday night. After a loan spell…

arts.ttl: Lille predicted XI v Auxerre: Matias Fernandez-Pardo and Edon Zhegrova out
arts.sum: Bruno Genesio’s options on the wing are limited as Lille OSC travel to the Stade de l’Abbé-Deschamps to take on AJ Auxerre on Friday night. Matias Fernandez-Pardo suffered a torn…

arts.ttl: Napoli interested in Lille’s Edon Zhegrova
arts.sum: Edon Zhergrova (25) has made it clear that he does not see his long-term future at Lille OSC. He had wanted to leave over the summer, however, Les Dogues refused…
